---
title: "Classical Games"
description: "Prisoner's Dilemma, Hawk-Dove, oligopoly, bargaining, coordination — the canonical games."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="classical-games"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Classical Games

Prisoner's Dilemma, Hawk-Dove, oligopoly, bargaining, coordination — the canonical games.
